title: stachys officinalis subsp. balcanica
intro: Stachys officinalis subsp. balcanica, also known as Balkan betony or Balkan hedge nettle, is a plant species within the mint family, characterized by its distinctive leaves and red flowers. It possesses medicinal properties due to its rich content of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, making it a valuable remedy for overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Stachys officinalis subsp. balcanica is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized effectively.
